title: json-proxy: Verify *either* manifest list or per-arch signature
body:
I didn't realize @mtrmac was working on this too in https://github.com/containers/container-libs/pull/765

---

This one also notably wires up the proxy to the existing signature tests, and adds a test case for the manifest list case.

comments.body:
> Just some notes for now — I’d be happy to incorporate this in https://github.com/containers/container-libs/pull/765, or if you want to finish this and fully own the credit, that’s also great.Just some notes for now — I’d be happy to incorporate this in https://github.com/containers/container-libs/pull/765, or if you want to finish this and fully own the credit, that’s also great.

I don't have a strong opinion either, I added you as Co-authored-by here.
